# .NET 10.0 Package Update Progress

## Overview

Updating NuGet packages to latest compatible versions for 2 projects already on .NET 10.0. All-at-Once approach: all packages updated simultaneously.

**Progress**: 0/5 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%

## Tasks

- 🔲 01-prerequisites: Verify SDK and toolchain compatibility
- 🔲 02-update-packages: Update all NuGet packages
- 🔲 03-build-and-fix: Build solution and resolve any issues
- 🔲 04-run-tests: Execute test suite
- 🔲 05-final-validation: Validate solution health
